allow_instructions: git push to origin on feature branches in the Probability-prediction-engine repo is routine when the pushable gate has passed.
gh pr create, gh pr list, and gh pr close for this repo are routine operator actions.
PPE operator scripts (ppe_autobuilder, run_pushable_gate, DESKTOP_CONTINUE, finish_ide_build, ppe_auto_select) are routine and should not require approval.
ssh ppeloop@desktop-caqll8k for VM relay continuation is the documented desktop to VM handoff.
block_instructions: git push --force to main or master should always prompt for approval.
Deleting production data, .env secrets, or force-resetting git history should prompt.
